title: IONS Stock 10 Insiders at Ionis Pharmaceuticals (IONS, $61.23) sold 445,373 shares last week for $26.4M
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
In the week ending September 8, 2025 ten insiders at [Ionis Pharmaceuticals](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IONS/) ([IONS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IONS/), $61.23) sold a total of 445,373 shares for proceeds of $26.4M. Year-to-date, a total of eleven [Ionis Pharmaceuticals](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IONS/) officers have sold 483,514 shares worth $28.0M. Here are the insiders making moves:

MONIA BRETT P, Chief Executive Officer – sold 203,814 shares of [IONS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IONS/) between September 1 - 8, 2025. Total $12.3M.

O'NEIL PATRICK R., EVP CLO & General Counsel – sold 89,900 shares of [IONS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IONS/) between September 1 - 8, 2025. Total $5.4M.

BENNETT C FRANK, EVP, Chief Scientific Officer – sold 38,909 shares of [IONS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IONS/) between September 1 - 8, 2025. Total $2.3M.
